title: Phase 10B: Purchasing module - three-way match, vendor scorecards, vendor claims
description: Build purchasing module secondary UI: three-way match review page (PO vs Receipt vs Invoice), vendor scorecards with reliability/fill rate/cost metrics, and vendor claim workflow page.
steps: Display side-by-side comparison: PO lines vs receiving lines vs invoice lines
Highlight discrepancies with severity indicators, allow manual resolution
Show metrics: on-time delivery rate, fill rate, cost volatility, quality score, claim rate
Include claim creation, tracking, resolution, and credit memo management
